name: Danbooru Anime
description: Search public Danbooru posts by tags and page controls without exposing account credentials.

auth.hint: The selected public post-search operation requires no authentication. Account-specific limits and operations require separate Basic authentication.

tools.name: search_posts
tools.description: Search public Danbooru image posts by tags.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of posts to return, subject to account limits.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number or supported cursor expression.
